data.body: 18f9 implementation tier result: standard-tier gpt-5.6-terra. Attempt 1 passed visible happy path and 7 initial held-out cases; strong review found config list[str] scan_roots gap. Attempt 2 accepted str|Path roots and full held-out oracle passed 8/8 required; live scc smoke skipped as supplementary because scc absent. Defect-seeded mutation that converted successful [] into Unavailable made test_empty_tree RED; production restored and full metrics suite 69 passed, 1 skipped. Refactoring litmus passed (observable outputs only).
